name: OpenSSF Scorecard Maintenance Signal Control Extract
population_or_context: Maintenance signal control baseline for software supply-chain review.
sample_size: one official Scorecard check documentation page covering five maintenance-related checks
methods: Extracted the Scorecard Maintained, Contributors, Code-Review, CI-Tests, and Security-Policy check descriptions, risk framing, detection windows, remediation notes, and documented limitations from the official OpenSSF Scorecard check documentation.

domain_fields.control_signal: Recent maintenance activity, contributor context, human review, CI test execution, and vulnerability reporting policy
domain_fields.review_boundary: Specification-level check documentation, not a repository-specific Scorecard run
domain_fields.risk_interpretation: Provides a baseline for distinguishing observable maintenance signals from conclusions about code quality or long-term support
domain_fields.limitations: Does not establish that a specific repository is actively maintained, responsive, well governed, or secure
